name: social-sciences-in-china-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to 《中国社会科学》 (Social Sciences in China) — the Chinese Academy of Social Sciences flagship and the most prestigious cross-disciplinary social-science journal in China (monthly, ISSN 1002-4921, CN 11-1211/C). Covers fit judgment, problematic / big-question framing, original theory and China's autonomous knowledge system, theory-tradition literature dialogue, argumentation rigor, evidence (quantitative / qualitative / historical), scholarly house style, 200–300-character abstract + keywords, submission preflight (footnote conventions, online system), and external-review rebuttals.
